sentences.text: Why investing feels harder than it is
Most people delay investing for years — not because the core ideas are hard, but because the language is intimidating.
Every article assumes you already know what an index fund is.
Every explanation of compounding uses three other terms you don't know yet.
At your level — "explain like I'm new to this" actually works
With analogies from your life — cooking, sports, whatever clicks for you
Patiently — you can ask the same thing five different ways without embarrassment
